svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="4uM-1Zy_dXYYFp7blv_G"> <mxGraphModel dx="961" dy="554" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
title Use Case Diagram - Communication Loss in Truck Platoon

left to right direction

actor \"Lead Truck\" as Lead
actor \"Other Follow Trucks\" as Others
actor \"Fleet Operator\" as Operator

rectangle \"Affected Follow Truck\" {

 usecase \"Handle Communication Loss\" as UC1
 usecase \"Notify Platoon\" as UC2
 usecase \"Request Rejoin\" as UC3
 usecase \"Leave Platoon Safely\" as UC4
}

Lead --> UC1
Lead --> UC3

Others --> UC2

Operator --> UC1

UC1 ..> UC2 : <<include>>
UC1 ..> UC3 : <<extend>>
UC1 ..> UC4 : <<extend>>

@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="Sl3C0XrnUJYJ2ZqpXSb_-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="375" width="670" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
